mapper.select: select g.*, t.type_name from goods g left join goods_type t on g.type_id = t.id
mapper.insert: insert into goods ( goods_name, type_id, buy_price, sell_price, stock_num , image_url , remark , create_time , update_time ) values ( #{goodsName}, #{typeId}, #{buyPrice}, #{sellPrice}, #{stockNum} , #{imageUrl} , #{remark} , now() , now() )
mapper.delete:
delete from goods where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select g.*,t.type_name from goods g left join goods_type t on g.type_id = t.id where g.stock_num < g.min_stock
